title: Pixel Office Control Room UI
summary: Deliver the 0.0.3 interactive pixel-art workspace for WorkpackManager, including room-based workpack visualization, animated agent avatars, desk-level assignment and controls, chat-preview hover affordances, and a repository-grouped Git diff side panel.

prompts.agent_role: Baseline the current extension UI architecture, confirm branch context, and define scene/state contracts for the pixel office experience
Implement the pixel-art room shell that maps a workpack to a room with fixed locations for desks, request, plan, status, outputs, and ambient decoration
Create animated agent avatars and bind runtime states so agents appear at desks, move to the output board, and raise a hand for manual input
Add desk interactions for assignment and control menus plus hover-driven agent chat previews and runtime affordances
Build the side-panel Git diff inspector grouped by repository with full-path file entries and integration hooks from the pixel room UI
Polish the pixel-art presentation with color, layering, animation timing, accessibility fallbacks, and final room composition
Verify UX behavior, animation states, desk interactions, diff panel behavior, and overall integration readiness for 0.0.3
Capture delivery learnings for the pixel office feature after verification
